# Civ Modding Central

> Civilization V modding workspace with guided planning, generators, references, art tools, packaging helpers, publishing support, and a growing Modded Civs Pedia.

Civ Modding Central provides guided planning, template generators, a pattern library, schema and Lua references, art helpers, packaging tools, community resources, the standalone CMC Workshop Uploader, and a Modded Civs Pedia for custom civ entries, collections, categories, and creators.

## Main pages

- Home: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/
- modded civs pedia: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia
- map viewer: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/map-viewer
- guided planner: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/guided-planner
- template generators: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/template-generators
- pattern library: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/pattern-library
- schema browser: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/schema-browser
- lua api explorer: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/lua-api-explorer
- religion support: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/religion-support
- tech tree viewer: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/tech-tree-viewer
- civ icon maker: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/civ-icon-maker
- dds converter: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/dds-converter
- modinfo builder: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modinfo-builder
- civ5mod ziper: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/civ5mod-ziper
- workshop uploader: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/workshop-uploader
- community links: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/community-links

## Modded Civs Pedia

- Hub: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia

### Collections

- CBR Mk2 10th Anniversary: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/collection/cbr-mk2-10th-anniversary-collection
- Crossroads of the World: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/collection/crossroads-of-the-world
- Dark Days: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/collection/dark-days
- Dutch Civilization Pack: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/collection/dutch-civilization-pack
- Land of Snows: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/collection/land-of-snows
- Vanilla Civilizations: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/collection/vanilla-civilizations

### Authors

- Coiot: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/author/coiot
- ExplosiveWatermelon: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/author/explosivewatermelon
- NopeCopter: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/author/nopecopter
- Orangechrisy: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/author/orangechrisy
- Rhoze: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/author/rhoze
- TopHatPaladin: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/author/tophatpaladin
- Tradboy: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/author/tradboy

### Entry pages

- Angel Mounds (Selu): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/angel-mounds-selu
- County of Holland (Floris V): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/county-of-holland-floris-v
- Malacca Sultanate (Mansur Shah): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/malacca-sultanate-mansur-shah
- Osage Nation (Pawhuska): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/osage-nation-pawhuska
- Palenque El Limón (Leonor): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/palenque-el-lim-n
- Republic of the Seven United Netherlands (Maurice): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/republic-of-the-seven-united-netherlands-maurice
- Republic of the Seven United Netherlands (William): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/republic-of-the-seven-united-netherlands-william
- The Tairona (Guacanaoma): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/tairona-guacanaoma
- The Anangu (Tjilpi): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/the-anangu-tjilpi
- The Dzungars (Galdan Khan): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/the-dzungars-galdan-khan
- The Khoshuts (Güshi Khan): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/the-khoshuts
- The Lenca (Lempira): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/the-lenca-lempira
- The Northern Paiute (Truckee): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/the-northern-paiute-truckee
- The Pomo (Essie Parrish): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/the-pomo-essie-parrish
- The Ponca (White Eagle): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/the-ponca-white-eagle
- The Zenú (Totó): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/the-zen-tot
- Great Tibet (Ralpachen): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/tibet-ralpachen
- Tibet (Thupten Gyatso): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/tibet-thupten-gyatso
- Yarlung (Nyatri Tsenpo): https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modded-civs-pedia/yarlung-nyatri-tsenpo
